scripts.help:scripts:
node -e "console.log('build: build all workspaces
clean: clean all workspaces
build:hello: build + zip hello lambda
infra:init: terraform init (download providers/modules)
infra:plan: terraform dry-run preview
infra:apply: create/update AWS resources
infra:destroy: delete AWS resources
infra:output:hello: raw hello endpoint URL
infra:show:hello: labeled hello endpoint URL')"
